title: Offline Lab Per-Arch Package Index
description: packages/<arch>/index.json — one entry per package (latest version only). Signed with the repo's index key. Devices download only the index for their arch. See docs/specs/repository.md.

spec_version.description: Schema version. Always '1' for this version of the spec.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update.

key_rotation.description: Incremented on each option B key rotation. appctl re-verifies all installed packages from this repo when the counter increases.

packages.description: One entry per package name. Latest published version only. Version history is a client-side concern.

tags.description: Classification tags. Used for appctl search.

squashfs_size.description: Size of the squashfs image in bytes. Used for pre-install storage check.

signing_key_id.description: key_id of the build cert used to sign this package's .roothash.p7s. appctl looks up the matching cert to verify at install time. Null in v1 (key rotation not yet implemented).

custom_profile.description: True if the package uses systemd_profile: custom. Flagged in appctl list output.

metadata_url.description: Relative URL to the package metadata JSON file. Relative to repo base_url.

zip_url.description: Relative URL to the transport zip (all five package files). Relative to repo base_url.
